name: storm-research
description: The Stanford STORM research method as a Claude skill. Turns any topic into a sourced, reliability-scored research briefing by simulating 5 expert perspectives (practitioner, academic, skeptic, economist, historian), mapping where they contradict, synthesizing the findings, then peer-reviewing its own work. Includes /research-feature, a repo-grounded variant that bridges into the agent-pipeline /ship workflow. Based on STORM (Stanford OVAL Lab, NAACL 2024).
